subject: Update project structure for aaf/cadi
commit_message:
Update project structure for aaf/cadi

Update project structure from com.att to org.onap
and add distribution management and staging plugin.

Issue-id: AAF-22
Change-Id: Ie9d70f4c8adbb0f5e48e8586942a3ff2b5f988ce
Signed-off-by: sg481n <sg481n@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/aaf-cadi-master-verify-java/4/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.onap.aaf.authz:authz-client:jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT needed for sub-project org.onap.aaf.cadi:cadi-aaf:jar:1.0.0-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version.
